caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Remain Moderate
caribbean.paragraph: Antigua is experiencing winds of 14 kt with wave heights reaching 3.0 ft, while Cartagena is seeing slightly lighter conditions with winds of 12 kt. I expect the primary concern for these ports to be the high rain probability, reaching up to 85% in Antigua, which may cause disruptions to outdoor activities and ship operations.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Rain Hits Marseille
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing heavy rain with a 100% probability of precipitation, accompanied by moderate winds of 16 kt and wave heights reaching 5.4 ft. Lisbon is also seeing similar conditions, with winds of 17 kt, as a low-pressure system brings wet weather to the Western Mediterranean, affecting both major ports.
